intro.subtitle: Navigate in one of the routes below to an extra content of my hobbies, with a creative presentation of each theme.

anime-manga.title: Animes & Mangas
anime-manga.description: Animes and mangas are, respectively, cartoons and HQs made in Japan, having unique animations and looks, with several existing genres

games.title: Games
games.description: One of the forms of entertainment nowadays with the most interactivity, with an impressive immersion and captivanting stories in many devices

football.title: Football
football.description: Football is the most popular at the moment, because of the transmitted emotion, game intensity and, mainly, the randomness of the plays

drawings.title: Drawings
drawings.description: Drawing is one of the most known forms of expressing feelings, showing through pencil and paper or digitally
